name: GitHub
description: Access repositories, issues, pull requests, and code on GitHub
description_zh: 访问 GitHub 上的仓库、Issue、Pull Request 和代码

mcp_config.name: github
mcp_config.description: GitHub - repositories, issues, PRs, code search, file operations

auth.help_text: Create a Personal Access Token at github.com/settings/tokens with repo scope
auth.help_text_zh: 在 github.com/settings/tokens 创建具有 repo 权限的个人访问令牌

name: GitLab
description: Access GitLab repositories, merge requests, and CI/CD pipelines
description_zh: 访问 GitLab 仓库、合并请求和 CI/CD 流水线

mcp_config.name: gitlab
mcp_config.description: GitLab - projects, merge requests, issues, CI/CD pipelines

auth.help_text: Create a Personal Access Token with api scope in GitLab settings
auth.help_text_zh: 在 GitLab 设置中创建具有 api 权限的个人访问令牌

name: Sentry
description: Monitor errors and performance issues tracked in Sentry
description_zh: 监控 Sentry 中追踪的错误和性能问题

mcp_config.name: sentry
mcp_config.description: Sentry error monitoring - issues, events, releases, performance

auth.help_text: Create an auth token at sentry.io Settings → API → Auth Tokens
auth.help_text_zh: 在 sentry.io 设置 → API → Auth Tokens 创建认证令牌

name: Code Review Graph
description: Code intelligence MCP server with 28 tools for call graph, dead code detection, community analysis, execution flow, semantic search, and automated wiki generation
description_zh: 代码智能 MCP 服务器，28 个工具覆盖调用图、死代码检测、社区分析、执行流、语义搜索和自动 Wiki 生成

mcp_config.name: code-review-graph
mcp_config.description: Code intelligence - call graphs, dead code, community detection, execution flow, semantic search, wiki

auth.help_text: No API key required. Install via pip: pip install code-review-graph. Requires Python 3.10+
auth.help_text_zh: 无需 API Key。通过 pip 安装：pip install code-review-graph，需要 Python 3.10+

name: CodeGraph
description: Code knowledge graph MCP server with symbol indexing, call graph, FTS5 search, file watcher, and cross-language bridge for 10+ languages
description_zh: 代码知识图谱 MCP 服务器，支持符号索引、调用图、FTS5 全文搜索、文件监听、10+ 语言跨语言桥接

mcp_config.name: codegraph
mcp_config.description: CodeGraph - code knowledge graph, symbol search, call paths, file watching

auth.help_text: No API key required. Requires Node.js 18+
auth.help_text_zh: 无需 API Key，需要 Node.js 18+
